issue.title: feat: in-app framework update — detect outdated .claude/commands/tiki/ and reinstall with one click

phases.title: Backend: stamp version, embed commands, IPC commands
phases.content: Update packages/framework/install.js to write `<cwd>/.tiki/.framework-version` after copying commands (read version from packages/framework/.claude-plugin/plugin.json). Add `include_dir = "0.7"` to apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml. Use `include_dir!("../../../packages/framework/commands")` in commands.rs to embed framework command files at compile time (offline + dev/prod parity). Add two new Tauri IPC commands: `install_framework(app, project_path)` iterates the embedded dir, writes each .md file to `<project>/.claude/commands/tiki/`, then writes `app.package_info().version` to `<project>/.tiki/.framework-version`; `read_framework_version(project_path)` returns the contents of `.tiki/.framework-version` or None. Register both in lib.rs invoke_handler.
verification: install_framework and read_framework_version are registered in lib.rs
install_framework takes (project_path: String) and returns Result<String, String> with the installed version

phases.title: Frontend: detection, toast, badge
phases.content: Add optional `frameworkVersion: string | null` field to Project type in projectsStore.ts. Update useProjectsStore to support setProjectFrameworkVersion(id, version). In ProjectsSection.tsx (or App.tsx alongside the existing project-switch effect), call `read_framework_version` on every project switch, compare to `getVersion()` from @tauri-apps/api/app. When mismatched or null, dispatch an info toast with text "Framework outdated for {project.name} — click to update" — but since the existing toast system has no actions, use a plain info toast plus a clickable badge on ProjectCard.tsx. Add a small "Update available" badge to ProjectCard that, when clicked, calls `install_framework(project.path)` then refreshes frameworkVersion. Use existing project-card styling conventions.
verification: On project switch, read_framework_version is called and result stored
ProjectCard shows update badge when frameworkVersion is null or older than app version
Clicking the badge calls install_framework and clears the stale state

phases.title: version.md update + final verification
phases.content: Update packages/framework/commands/version.md to read installed framework version from `<project>/.tiki/.framework-version` (preferred) with fallback to `packages/framework/.claude-plugin/plugin.json`. This makes /tiki:version consistent with the desktop app's view. Run final pnpm build + cargo check. Sync the installed copy at .claude/commands/tiki/version.md with the source.
verification: version.md reads from .framework-version first, plugin.json as fallback
